{{Infobox character
| name = Sola Kalter
| aliases = Sola
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|split her Flame into several pieces, fire a lance of light, summon Worldslayer, [[pulse boosters]]}}{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|, [[Temporal Field]]}}{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|, clones that engage Temporal Fields, conjure a handgun}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Fallen Sword]], Sword of The Last Horizon, Knight of the Titan Force, [[the Sword|The Sword]]}}{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|, Miss Kalter}}{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|, [[Vice Chief of Planetary Security|Vice Chief]]}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Titan Force]], [[The Last Horizon]], [[Iron Legion]]}}{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|, [[Union]]}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|gun for hire, warrior}}{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|, crew member, [[Pilot|pilot]]}}{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|, worker}}
| residence = {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Last Horizon]]}}
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Captain (novel)|The Captain]]
}}

''See also: [[Sola Kalter Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Sola [[Kalter]], also known as Sola or the [[Fallen Sword]], is a highly skilled mercenary and gun for hire. She is widely regarded as a mythic figure due to her extensive experience fighting the [[Iron Legion]], an organization she knows intimately. Sola possesses a vast collection of weaponry and exhibits exceptional proficiency with [[Aethertech]], which allows her to maintain a long-standing solo campaign against the [[Legion]]. Her specialized combat armor is described as masterwork [[Aethertech]], featuring temperature regulation and a green visor. She also utilizes a weapon called [[Worldslayer]]. Sola has served as the [[Sword of The Last Horizon]], a position she accepted with the sole condition that her goal of destroying the [[Iron Legion]] be fulfilled. In this role, she has acted as a protector for her captain and provided security during transitions. Despite her mercenary background, she has connections to the [[Galactic Union]], though her relatives in the [[Dornoth system]] have faced persecution and were accused of being [[Karoshan spies]]. Sola's history includes spending time at an orphanage on [[Dornoth]] Four and engaging in various high-stakes combat missions.}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Known by the codename [[Fallen Sword]], Sola [[Kalter]] is a Knight of the [[Titan Force]] and a gun for hire who operates under the motto, "If it’s not [[Iron Legion]], call someone else." This warrior on a crusade possesses pale gray skin marked by the [[Lichborn]] and bright green eyes that flare with deathly light. Bound to her bulky gray power armor and her greatest gun, she utilizes pulse boosters to dash and wields a lightning-powered two-handed weapon capable of firing magic-keyed lances of light. Sola demonstrates extraordinary compatibility with [[Aethertech]], utilizing an inventory to store weapons like her [[Worldslayer]] and armor that can dissolve into floating blue cubes. Throughout her exploits, she relies on a unique spell beyond [[Archmage]]-level and a flame of resurrection to sustain herself through intense combat.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">44</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Sola is known as [[Fallen Sword]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c10">''The Captain'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Sola wears power armor.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Sola uses the codename [[Fallen Sword]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The narrator expects to meet Sola.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c16">''The Captain'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Sola is a combatant whose armor provides warnings and visual alerts.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c17">''The Captain'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Sola has pale gray skin and an eye that shines with deathly green light.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c18">''The Captain'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Sola has the marks of the [[Lichborn]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Sola can split her Flame into several pieces.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Sola uses a two-handed gun that runs with lightning.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Sola's gun can fire a lance of light that carries magic keyed to the [[Iron Legion]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Sola's gun requires charging.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Sola's weapons can dissolve into particles and enter her inventory.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Sola possesses a unique spell that is beyond [[Archmage]]-level.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Sola is bound to her armor.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Sola is bound to her greatest gun.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Sola uses a gun that can annihilate an entire hall.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Sola has extraordinary compatibility with [[Aethertech]] weapons.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c19">''The Captain'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Sola Kalter]] is a gun for hire.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Sola Kalter]] possesses a flame of resurrection.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Sola Kalter]]'s motto is 'If it’s not [[Iron Legion]], call someone else.'<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Sola has a leg that a little girl was prying off of.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c21">''The Captain'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Sola Kalter]] is a Knight of the [[Titan Force]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Sola spends her time dismantling the [[Iron Legion]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c26">''The Captain'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Sola might have seen a specific creation in a [[Hive]] before.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c27">''The Captain'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Sola Kalter]] is a warrior on a crusade.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c28">''The Captain'', chapter 28</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Sola Kalter]] is known as the [[Fallen Sword]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c28" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Sola is a character who uses a shotgun and has an inventory.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c29">''The Captain'', chapter 29</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Sola is the [[Sword of The Last Horizon]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c29" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Sola uses pulse boosters in her armor to dash.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c29" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Sola possesses a [[Worldslayer]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c32">''The Captain'', chapter 32</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Sola is someone the Captain relies on.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c35">''The Captain'', chapter 35</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Sola uses a gun that can be placed into an inventory.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c38">''The Captain'', chapter 38</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Sola's eyes flare with green light.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c39">''The Captain'', chapter 39</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Sola has bright green eyes.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c39" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Sola is ready to tear the ship in half if given a signal.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c40">''The Captain'', chapter 40</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Sola has a camp focused on executing [[Omal]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c40" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Sola wears bulky gray armor and can summon [[Worldslayer]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c42">''The Captain'', chapter 42</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Sola used a spear against the narrator's hammer.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c42" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Sola wears armor that can dissolve into floating blue cubes.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c44">''The Captain'', chapter 44</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Tendrils from the [[Iron King]]'s back were battling Sola.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c45">''The Captain'', chapter 45</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Sola was about to revive.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c45" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Sola was being reborn in flame in her room.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c45" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Sola wears a silver helmet with a visor.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c47">''The Captain'', chapter 47</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Sola put away the [[Worldslayer]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c48">''The Captain'', chapter 48</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Known as the [[Sword of The Last Horizon]], Sola [[Kalter]] is a crew member who previously operated alone and now seeks the destruction of the [[Iron Legion]]. Clad in gray power armor with an emerald visor that streams text into her processor, she utilizes suit speakers and possesses weapons capable of reaching into [[Subspace]]. During her service, she has piloted a captured [[Lichborn heavy shuttle]], protected prisoners, and utilized a [[Suncaster L-14]]. Her specialized suit can be dispersed and re-formed by her, allowing it to partially keep up with a [[Temporal Field]]. Following the fall of the [[Iron Legion]], Sola became more relaxed and has since been responsible for readying ships to fire and projecting holographic schematics of [[Advocate headquarters]].}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">31</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Sola is a crew member who uses suit speakers.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c2">''The Engineer'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Sola Kalter]] is the [[Sword of The Last Horizon]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c3">''The Engineer'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Sola Kalter]] wears gray power armor with an emerald visor.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Sola is a crew member who seeks the destruction of the [[Iron Legion]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c5">''The Engineer'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Sola is a crew member who wears full armor and operates guns.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c9">''The Engineer'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Sola is a crew member who previously operated alone.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c10">''The Engineer'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Sola piloted a captured [[Lichborn heavy shuttle]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c12">''The Engineer'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Sola is a character who uses a pistol to shoot stun bolts.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Sola possesses weapons that can reach into [[Subspace]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c15">''The Engineer'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Sola stepped forward to protect the prisoners.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c17">''The Engineer'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Sola is in the personal weapons laboratory of [[The Last Horizon]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c21">''The Engineer'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Sola's armor can be dispersed and re-formed by her.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Sola's suit visor streams text into her processor.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Sola Kalter]] questioned if [[Queen Shyrax]] was a master.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Sola is a source for weapons in the envisioned fleet.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c24">''The Engineer'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Sola is a member of the crew of [[The Last Horizon]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c29">''The Engineer'', chapter 29</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Sola is a person who can control engines.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c29" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Sola reads readouts from a monitor.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c30">''The Engineer'', chapter 30</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Sola is a member of the crew who became more relaxed following the fall of the [[Iron Legion]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c32">''The Engineer'', chapter 32</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Sola is jogging.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c32" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Sola wears a full suit of gray armor.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c34">''The Engineer'', chapter 34</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Sola is responsible for readying the ships to fire.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c36">''The Engineer'', chapter 36</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Sola is present during the discussion.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c39">''The Engineer'', chapter 39</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Sola sat stoically while [[Lichborn orphans]] crawled on her.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c45">''The Engineer'', chapter 45</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Sola has a [[Suncaster L-14]] in her inventory.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c48">''The Engineer'', chapter 48</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Sola projected a holographic schematic of [[Advocate headquarters]] from her suit's console.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c50">''The Engineer'', chapter 50</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Sola has [[Union]] contacts.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c50" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Sola nodded to Shyrax's command.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c50" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Sola Kalter]] is known as [[the Sword]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c52">''The Engineer'', chapter 52</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Sola Kalter]]'s suit can keep up with [[Starhammer]]'s [[Temporal Field]] to some degree.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c52" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Sola uses a powerful weapon and has a [[Temporal Field]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c52" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|A reliable worker for hire who prefers the [[Iron Legion]], Miss [[Kalter]] serves as a crew member on [[The Last Horizon]]. While wearing [[Aethertech armor]] with a green visor, she operates various consoles to unload missiles and [[Subspace torpedoes]], though her offensive firepower is sometimes limited by the need to maintain shields. During her time onboard, she has performed guard duty outside the bridge, inspected the [[Zenith Cannon]] before handing it over to [[Omega]], and used the [[Worldslayer]] to shoot [[Sel’miroth]]. After materializing in a cramped room with hissing pipes, she was later found in the [[workshop]] working on a disassembled handgun. Throughout her various contracts, including targeting the [[Visiri]], she has remained a prepared companion to Varic and has even warned others against the risks of traveling to the Heart of [[Visiria]].}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">33</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Sola wears armor with a green visor and [[Aethertech]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c4">''The Knight'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Sola wants to lock down the [[Zenith Cannon]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c8">''The Knight'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Sola reports problems to the narrator.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c14">''The Knight'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Sola is a reliable worker who works for hire.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c15">''The Knight'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Sola is currently on another contract.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Sola prefers sticking to the [[Iron Legion]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Sola is a companion of Varic who operates the cruiser.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c16">''The Knight'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Sola is a companion of Varic who uses the [[Worldslayer]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Sola communicates via a processor.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Sola used [[Worldslayer]] to shoot [[Sel’miroth]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c17">''The Knight'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Sola reads and summarizes reports on the situation.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c18">''The Knight'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Sola materialized in a dark, cramped room with pipes hissing over her head.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Sola is referred to as Miss [[Kalter]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c21">''The Knight'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Sola was on guard duty outside the bridge.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c22">''The Knight'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Sola inspected the [[Zenith Cannon]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c22" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Sola handed the [[Zenith Cannon]] over to [[Omega]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c22" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Sola toys with a gun.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c23">''The Knight'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Sola is someone Varic intends to check on.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c28">''The Knight'', chapter 28</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Sola is onboard the ship.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c28" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Sola was in the [[workshop]] sitting at a desk with a half-disassembled handgun.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c28" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Sola's medical room incorporates [[Lichborn]] design elements and a light made of flickering [[green flame]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c32">''The Knight'', chapter 32</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Sola warned that going to the Heart of [[Visiria]] was a stupid risk.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c35">''The Knight'', chapter 35</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Sola is tasked with targeting the [[Visiri]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c36">''The Knight'', chapter 36</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Sola is a crew member or entity on [[The Last Horizon]] who follows plans.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c37">''The Knight'', chapter 37</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Sola's ability to use weapons was limited by how much of the shield had to be maintained.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c37" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Sola is a crew member of [[The Last Horizon]] who uses offensive firepower.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c38">''The Knight'', chapter 38</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Sola is a crew member.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c39">''The Knight'', chapter 39</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Sola operates a console on [[The Last Horizon]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c40">''The Knight'', chapter 40</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Sola is a character who unloads missiles and [[Subspace torpedoes]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c40" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Shyrax woke Sola.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c40" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Sola is part of a group that can draw up battle plans.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c41">''The Knight'', chapter 41</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Sola is more prepared than the others and wears her armor at her console.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c44">''The Knight'', chapter 44</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Sola told Raion to stay alive.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c44" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Sola [[Kalter]] is a gray titan serving as Vice Chief and a shuttle pilot for [[Horizon]]. Equipped with temperature-regulated combat armor, a green visor, and an audio implant, she utilizes various technologies including sensor displays, wrist consoles, and a gun that can dissolve into cubes of light. During her service as a crewmate to [[Omega]], she identified the [[Hive]] as containing everything required to create a King and successfully engaged [[Aila Escalon]] in combat, eventually splattering her across [[Dornoth]]'s orbit. Throughout the conflict, Sola demonstrated versatile combat abilities by deploying clones to engage Temporal Fields, using matter-reduction grenades, and redirecting power through the weapons systems of [[The Last Horizon]]. Despite experiencing fear and frustration during battle, she ultimately advised the Captain to leave while managing her weaponry and specialized gear.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">39</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Sola is a pilot of one of [[Horizon]]’s shuttles.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c3">''The Pilot'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Sola wears temperature-regulated combat armor.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c4">''The Pilot'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Sola is the Vice Chief.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Sola uses a gun with impact rounds.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Sola wears a green visor.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Sola has armor held in a frame.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c8">''The Pilot'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Sola taps images on sensor displays and tosses them onto holo-projectors.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c10">''The Pilot'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Sola reacts to the star-map by identifying 'The [[Hive]]!'<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Sola notes that everything needed to make a King is in the [[Hive]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Sola can fire weapons from the ship.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c12">''The Pilot'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Sola is ready to fire and requested permission.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c14">''The Pilot'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Sola unleashes green fury on [[Omega’s daughter]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Sola uses clones that engage Temporal Fields.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Sola won an exchange against Aila and splattered her across [[Dornoth]]’s orbit.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c15">''The Pilot'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Sola manufactures ammunition and has a green [[Lichborn]] eye.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c19">''The Pilot'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Sola projects station maps from her armor's wrist console.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c20">''The Pilot'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Sola communicates via audio implant.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c25">''The Pilot'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Sola is experiencing frustration and fear during the battle.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c28">''The Pilot'', chapter 28</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Sola is a crewmate of [[Omega]] who uses weaponry.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c29">''The Pilot'', chapter 29</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Sola uses a gun to control and target weapons.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c29" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Sola is a combatant currently fighting a clone of Aila.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c29" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Sola would return to the ship if killed.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c30">''The Pilot'', chapter 30</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Sola lacks armor.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c30" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Sola uses a matter-reduction grenade from her [[Subspace inventory]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c30" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Sola's gun can dissolve into cubes of light.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c30" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Sola wears full armor and is walking through the [[Titan Force headquarters]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c32">''The Pilot'', chapter 32</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Sola believes there is always a trap.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c35">''The Pilot'', chapter 35</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Sola has family on Fathom.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c37">''The Pilot'', chapter 37</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Sola is a gray titan.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c37" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Sola can activate a [[Temporal Field]] to dash.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c37" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Sola can conjure a handgun.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c37" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Sola's helmet has speakers.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c37" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Sola's friend died.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c40">''The Pilot'', chapter 40</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Sola is a passenger on the shuttle.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c42">''The Pilot'', chapter 42</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Sola is someone [[Aila Escalon]] has fought.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c44">''The Pilot'', chapter 44</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Sola can summon her armor mid-stride.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c47">''The Pilot'', chapter 47</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Sola can emerge from her [[Pyre]] safely on a ship.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c48">''The Pilot'', chapter 48</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Sola redirected power throughout [[The Last Horizon]]’s weapons systems.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c49">''The Pilot'', chapter 49</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Sola advises the Captain to leave.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c49" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|“Fallen Sword. Thank you for responding to our request, but it’s all over.”<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c10" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|“If it’s not Iron Legion, call someone else.”<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c19" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|“I am Sola Kalter, Sword of The Last Horizon. I’m here to ensure that the bridge is safe for my captain.”<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c3" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|“And is she a master?” Sola asked him, though Shyrax was more than close enough to hear.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c21" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|“Is he going to come for us again?” Sola asked.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c39" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
[[Category:Titan Force]]
[[Category:Iron Legion]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Viewpoint characters]]
